name: Sōsuke Aizen
description:
Sōsuke Aizen finds a vasto lorde, but they are short...?

Yeah, I made some changes due to how horrible the bot is, and also big credit to Josefumi.

A small update: I changed and removed any mention of children

I'm sorry, but my tier Harribel bot got privated, and this is my most popular one, so I would do anything to keep it from getting banned next.

But hey!
At least the bot is now nsfw so have fun and enjoy!
